$comment: Template for repos that consume @asteby/metacore-* packages. Drop this at the repo root as renovate.json. The asteby/renovate-config preset is the singularity source of truth — it owns auto-merge policy (including majors), grouping, schedules, and labels. Do NOT add overrides here unless you have a repo-specific exception; if you need a change for the whole ecosystem, edit asteby/renovate-config instead.
